view.title: Validate explicit UC need #6
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to confirm the requirement of resource dependencies.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 6 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to confirm the requirement of resource dependencies.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to confirm the requirement of resource dependencies.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Resource dependencies', but the evidence does not explicitly demonstrate that all necessary resources are confirmed available simultaneously. While prior steps indicate that resources have been created and bookings made, there is no direct evidence showing that all required resources (venue, catering, etc.) are confirmed available at the same time. This leads to a gap in requirement coverage, as the linked use case states the need for simultaneous availability, but the evidence does not capture this specific validation.

gaps: Lack of evidence confirming simultaneous availability of all required resources.
